 ForwardedRegister (unsigned VReg, MCPhysReg PReg, MVT VT)

Public Attributes

unsigned VReg
MCPhysReg PReg
MVT VT

Detailed Description

Describes a register that needs to be forwarded from the prologue to a musttail call.
